summary: Exciting first set contrasted by a cluttered second set; recording source and quality are not specified.
review: The reviewer rates the first set as very good and exciting, while criticizing the second set for aggressive Hornsby keyboards that overwhelm tunes like "Saint" and "Comes A Time," and notes Garcia seeming to defer to the keyboards. No information about the recording source or sound quality is provided, leaving the technical side unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single moderate (3‑star) review; positive comments about set 1 but negative remarks on set 2 and no recording details, leading to an overall mixed assessment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or other technical aspects.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as very good and exciting; second set considered messy due to overbearing keyboards and less cohesive playing.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia is said to defer to Hornsby on the second set, implying weaker presence.
band_member_comments.Keys: Aggressive Hornsby keyboard playing described as overrunning tunes he doesn't fully know.
